text:
SHORT NAME: WVR_1115_EXPNSN_CVRG_POP_IND 

LONG NAME: WVR_1115_EXPNSN_CVRG_POP_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This data element is triggered by a value of “69”–“71” in any instance of 
MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD. 

These values are: 
69 = Individuals with Mental Health Conditions (expansion group) 
70 = Family Planning Participants (expansion group) 
71 = Other expansion group 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
